summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Dead Signal server monitoring application. All backend APIs working (37/37 tests passed). Frontend login and dashboard functionality fully operational. Server 'Lonely Island' is currently OFFLINE. WebSocket connection established. All major features tested successfully including live stats, console commands, AI narrative generation, and admin controls.
passed_tests: Backend API authentication (37/37 tests passed)
Login with Commander / DS-NV3F-CQ4Q-STFP-CVGN
Dashboard header shows 'CONNECTED' and 'SERVER OFFLINE' indicators
Server Status shows State: OFFLINE, CPU 0.0%, RAM 0 MB, Disk 1.8 GB with progress bars
Server Status shows server name 'Lonely Island'
Power controls (Start/Stop/Restart/Kill) are visible and functional
START button highlighted when server offline
Event Feed shows events with severity badges and timestamps
Event Feed shows 'server offline' indicator
Console tab shows COMMAND TERMINAL with LIVE FEED toggle
Console command input works for admin (tested 'help' command)
AI Narrative buttons generate content (Radio Report, Dawn Sitrep working)
Players tab shows Player Roster
Admin tab shows File System, Backups, and Auth Key Management
Backend: GET /api/server/live-stats returns real-time stats with state field
Backend: GET /api/server/console-log returns buffered console lines
Backend: POST /api/server/command sends commands successfully
Backend: Pterodactyl WS consumer is connected (ws_connected: true in live-stats)
WebSocket connection status properly displayed in header
Graceful offline state with clear messaging when server is down
All navigation tabs functional (Overview, Console, Players, Admin)
File system and backup management working
Auth key management system operational
AI narrative generation producing content
Refresh buttons working for all panels
